description: Welcome home to Heath West, a modern community of 67 homes proudly developed by BMG Real Estate. This 4 Bedroom, 2.5 bath home features an open layout, large kitchen w/ Fischer & Paykel SS appliances incl. gas range, double drawer dishwasher, O/S windows, high efficiency GAS furnace.  FREE Heat Pump + FREE W/D incl for limited time. Two car parking with double side by side garage! Finishes incl. slim shaker cabinets w/ quartz counters, covered deck w/ gas rough in, spacious master & spa inspired ensuite + many more special touches throughout! Heath West is located directly next to Donna Gabriel Robins elementary with a short walk to restaurants, parks and shopping. MOVE IN READY! Sales Centre & Showhome located at 7918 204B Street, Langley.
